e1_sentence: Narrated Abu Burda

e1_sentence: The Prophet sent his (i.e. Abu Burda's) grandfather, Abu Musa and Muadh to  Yemen and said to both of them "Facilitate things for the people (Be kind and  lenient) and do not make things difficult (for people), and give them good  tidings, and do not repulse them and both of you should obey each other.
